scripts.test:tree: rm -rf .tree-test && npx tsc src/features/tree/lineageGraphModel.ts src/features/tree/lineagePathModel.ts src/features/tree/lineageRequestState.ts src/features/tree/lineageSemanticsModel.ts src/features/tree/lineageUrlState.ts src/features/tree/treeDisplayModel.ts --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir .tree-test --skipLibCheck && node --test src/features/tree/lineageGraphModel.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineagePathModel.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineageRequestState.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineageSemanticsModel.test.mjs src/features/tree/lineageUrlState.test.mjs src/features/tree/treeDisplayModel.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .tree-test; exit $status
scripts.test:wizard: rm -rf .wizard-state-test && npx tsc src/features/mvp1/domain/status.ts src/features/mvp1/domain/wizardStepState.ts --ignoreConfig --rootDir src --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir .wizard-state-test --skipLibCheck && node --test src/features/mvp1/domain/wizardStepState.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .wizard-state-test; exit $status
scripts.test:culture-shell: rm -rf .culture-shell-test && npx tsc src/features/culture/cultureTabState.ts src/features/culture/cultureUrlState.ts src/features/culture/migrationEventUrlState.ts src/features/culture/cultureSiteUrlState.ts src/features/culture/cultureEditorState.ts --ignoreConfig --rootDir src --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir .culture-shell-test --skipLibCheck && node --test src/features/culture/cultureTabState.test.mjs src/features/culture/cultureUrlState.test.mjs src/features/culture/migrationEventUrlState.test.mjs src/features/culture/cultureSiteUrlState.test.mjs src/features/culture/cultureEditorState.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .culture-shell-test; exit $status
